254.reason: [After detecting a lexical error (single '&' or '|'), the lexer should not continue processing tokens normally; however, the current code does not increment curPos in the error case, causing an infinite loop or incorrect parsing. Additionally, after reporting the error, the program should ideally skip the invalid character to avoid reprocessing it, but curPos remains unchanged here.]
